prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat UI chrome pack for Orbwalker
Primary request: create a production candidate UI component sheet for combat frames, rails, slots, timer pieces, and dividers as an opaque chroma-key source.
Subject: combat top bar frame, enemy panel frame, board frame, mastery rail, player vitals frame, equipment slot, consumable slot, timer track, divider strip, corner ornament.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI chrome with dark stone, blackened steel, antique gold trim, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet with separated components and clean padding, no clipping.
Color palette: charcoal stone, steel, gold, subtle blue and violet accents, but no magenta inside components.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: one exact background color #FF00FF across all non-asset pixels; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no smoke touching background; no frame/panel/matte backdrop unless it is an actual UI component; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: absolutely no #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside any UI component art.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
